friends.name: Xinyu Fu
friends.description: Researching EEG Foundation Models and PEFT under Prof. Quanying Liu. Focused on AI4Neuroscience and Brain-inspired AI. Actively seeking 2026 summer internships and 2027 Ph.D. positions. Feel free to email for collaboration!

friends.name: Haojun Tang
friends.description: Undergraduate in Remote Sensing Science and Technology at Central South University (2023–Now). Specializing in 3D Vision, Photogrammetry, and Multi-modal Remote Sensing. Passionate about bridging UAV Embedded Systems with 3D Reconstruction to sense the world in higher dimensions.
